entry.title: Re: Porting Apps to SAP BTP
entry.content: Parallel processing requires breaking the monolith into micro services, then the choice between cloud foundry or K8S in BTP is up to your preferences, skills and  project.

entry.title: Re: Alternate Resource not appearing in PP/DS PDS in APO
entry.content:
Hi,

there are two ways:

1. Using the BADI in order to transfer the alternative seq. as in standard they are not transferred
2. using classification in order to get the different modes into the PDS.

ad 1. note 507025 - Examples for customer enhancements II
ad 2. note 2469590 Alternative resources from work center classification not updated in the PDS in APO (Product Data Structure)

entry.title: SAC write back to SAP datasphere
entry.content:
Hello, 

Can I add to a story based on datasphere a capability of correcting data and sending back to the source via datasphere?
If not, how can I create an exception report to locate my issues?

Thank you
Deb

entry.title: SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service - Authorization API: Role Collections all subaccount
entry.content:
Good morning,

We have a requirement to list the role collections of our subaccounts and their assigned IAS groups.

I am looking into the Authorization API:

https://api.sap.com/api/AuthorizationAPI/overview

This works fine. I create an XSUAA instance in a subaccount with plan api-access and I can get the role collections without any problem. The challenge comes when we want to achieve that for several subaccounts. Does this mean that we neeed to create an XSUAA instance in each subaccount and that we would need to call N times the API, each for each subaccount? Is it possible at all to achieve that at account level preventing us to create as many XSUAA instances as subaccounts?

Many thanks!

C.

entry.title: Re: How to extract business configuration data from SAP B...
entry.content: @kostadin_terziev  There is no option or provision to extract Business Configuration object data in SAP Business ByDesign

entry.title: Re: error in cl_sxml_string_writer, sXML Library
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. Yes, this is an workaround, but we are interested in getting an solution. The debugger cannot display XML that does not contain a declaration, even though the declaration is optional. Is it better to open a call to solve the program error?

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content: Hi @MohammedMubeen - welcome to SAP Community! Newcomers cannot publish a blog post immediately, since there is a wait time. Thank you for completing the tutorial, and we look forward to reading your future blog posts.

Could you please help .

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Dunning of Accounts Receivable Open Item from Residual Method of Partial Payment
entry.content: Hi Cel, I don't see any restrictions for residual items. But I was not the initial developer of this topic. If you think it doesn't work please open an incident and provide an example for testing.

entry.title: Re: SAP EBS Currency translation - FF.5

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2403
entry.content: @erickgrilo thank you for the question and apologies for the tardy response (vacation). I have forwarded your question to our experts and will let you know as soon as I have an answer. Best wishes!

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：EPPM话题
entry.content:
本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，EPPM板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容：

  1. 管理项目需求-预留物料
  2. 使用API复制创建项目

1.管理项目需求-预留物料

业务需求

项目采购负责人可以从项目库存计划和预留物料

项目管理者与仓储人员通过预留凭证观察项目物料请求与发货数量

系统案例

APP：管理项目需求（Manage Project Demand）,对物料TG12创建项目预留10件，需求类型：项目库存，预留，保存后产生预留编号。

APP：管理项目需求可以监控刚刚创建的项目预留凭证122763，观察请求与发货数量等详细信息

当创建完预留后，观察此时物料TG12的库存情况，在仓库101A中总预留12件（其中2件非项目库存预留），项目库存10件

对预留凭证122763进行项目发货，移动类型221，发货7件

注意：此时必须有项目库存才能发货。

此时再观察物料TG12的项目库存与预留情况变化如下：

通过APP：管理项目需求，观察到预留请求与发货数量的变化。

2.使用API复制创建项目

功能介绍

现有的API：Enterprise Project增强了复制功能，允许参考现有项目复制创建新的项目，生成具有自动调整计划日期的项目结构，可选复制项目需求和结算规则。

 

感谢观看

entry.title: CDS for Sales Order Header and Item Text
entry.content:
Can Sales Order Header and Item Text be extracted using CDS view, which can further be consumed using BODS. 

( Note- As Virtual elements are ODATA dependent hence not supported during BODS extraction. )

entry.title: Re: Higher Education & Research in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Dear Rob,

Greetings.

Thanks for sharing, such a wonderful blog to go-thru. Very informative. Its good news for people involved in SAP IS-HER. Nice to know so much work going on related to Higher Education & Research. Generative AI Assistance 'Joule' will be really helpful to everyone. So do SAP IS-HER/Public Sector modules will be completely on cloud or some part in On-Premise(SAP GUI/ ECC) to support some activities. As we see SAP HCM now on cloud as SAP SuccessFactors.

Thanks & Regards,

Syed Jalees ur Rahman

entry.title: Re: Multiple BP Bank account - SEPA Direct Debit.
entry.content:
Hi, actually there is a solution, where you can associate each and every sales order or SD contract with a specific customer SEPA mandate. The SEPA mandate is then again associated with the specific customer account in question.

I do not remember the details, but you might have a switch on a specific business function to have this functionality available.

Siew

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
@dr_eyer 
Welcome to SAP Community Paul! It's great to have your experience here.
I'm also sure you will meet many like minded SAP enthusiasts here!
If you meet some also from Berlin - we recommend to start small with an informal SAP Community event, like a meetup. You can take a look at existing location groups, and also upcoming events.
At a future point, you might also be interested in learning how to become an event organizer in Berlin!

@lauraschmitz @christoph_christophersen

entry.title: Re: how to repeat table in adobe form's masterpage?
Digital Signature for standard fiori application
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am extending a app from fiori app library and wanted to add a digital signature there in the object page section. After going through the help documentation Digital Signature Help Document , the configurations are not clear. Can anyone help on this topic about configurations and consuming the digital signature.

Thanks & Regards.
Arijeet

entry.title: SAP Event Broker for SAP Cloud Applications
entry.content:
1) Once I add a consumer to an existing formation, is there any way for this consumer to know about the events that have been sent by the producer it has subscribed to, previously. If yes, then how? If no, why?

2) Also is there a way for the producer to know which consumers have subscribed to which events of it? Maybe an API or some other technical way? One way is to simply find out from the subaccount where the formation is created, but is there any other better way?

3) Explain this scenario:
Producer: DPP team
Consumer: Firstly, the order management consumes events from DPP, then the T1, T2 tenants of Amazon consume events from order management.

Where and how will the formations be created? Explain how this scenario will work out.

Please respond to the above 3 questions or provide a documentation or link where I can find answers to these questions.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content:
Hi @KatherineKenneally

Thanks for the response. Could you please let me know how much is the wait time to publish a blog post

entry.title: Re: One chart of depreciation
entry.content: Yes it is possible.

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager for Windows 2.1 Compati...
entry.content:
At this point, the Metadata for windows 2.1.1 is based on the based on SSAM 2305 feature set.(so designed to work with a #SAP Service and Asset Manager 2305 backend configuration).
See also: https://me.sap.com/notes/3410896
Note that the metadata for SSAM on Windows is currently different from the metadata for IOS & Android so a separate app configuration in BTPms is strongly recommended.
D.

entry.title: Re: Task 10 - The power of CDL with as-select (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Pass!

entry.title: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2407
entry.content:
We're excited to share the latest news around SAP Asset Performance Management. This blog provides videos on our latest updates, for example, enhancements to the "copy tool" for strategy assessments for classes, providing increased traceability to the original assessment and recommendations, and an easier technical object assignment process in risk and criticality assessments, which is great when handling extensive technical object lists. Both improvements are geared to streamline user experience.

 

Asset Reliability Engineering

Display of Source Assessment and Recommendation when Copying Strategy Assessments for Classes

Our recently enhanced copy assessment feature now enables users to easily trace back to the original strategy assessment that was the basis for the copy. The related recommendations of the source assessment are also included in the copy. This enhancement bolsters user understanding and offers clear links back to original data, thereby enhancing decision-making processes, underpinning accountability, and simplifying overall strategy assessment management. Watch the video to see how it's done: 

 

 

Asset Risk Assessment

Optimization of Technical Object Assignment in Risk & Criticality Assessments

We have improved the assignment process for risk and criticality assessments by introducing a function that filters out technical objects (TOs) already assigned to other ongoing assessments. This enhancement addresses the challenge users faced when selecting large numbers of TOs, especially in risk and criticality assessments where handling extensive lists is common and tedious.

Previously, if any selected TOs were already part of another assessment, the entire selection would be rejected, requiring users to identify and remove conflicting TOs individually. Now, when users attempt to assign TOs, the system validates the selection. If some TOs cannot be assigned due to being already assigned elsewhere, the system notifies the user and presents the option to proceed with assigning only the eligible TOs. This approach streamlines the assignment process and improves usability significantly. Watch the demo to see how it works:

 

 

Keep in touch

Here's a quick reminder how to keep in touch with all things APM:

  • Register right now for our upcoming webcast Supercharge Your Condition-Based Maintenance with IoT and AI using SAP Asset Performance Management on July 24 (10am EDT, 4pm CET) 
  • Check out all past and present Intelligent Asset Management webcasts here. If you register for an IAM webcast, you will be automatically subscribed to our IAM Community Engagement Newsletter. 
  • Check some of our recent blogs:
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2406 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2405 
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2404
    • SAP Asset Performance Management Embedding Cumulocity IoT to Drive Innovations in IoT and AI
    • How AI-based Anomaly Detection empowers reliability engineers in SAP Asset Performance Management
    • SAP Asset Performance Management – FMEA (Failure Mode and Effects Analysis)
    • What's New SAP Asset Performance Management 2403
  • Subscribe to What's New on the SAP Help Portal
  • Submit or vote for the improvement you would like to see in the SAP Continuous Influence session

See you again soon for the 2408 release update!

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
When I learned the word "forte" for expertise, not the musical phrase, it was pronounced with the 'e' silent. That was a few decades ago. Now I rarely hear that. 

https://www.dictionary.com/browse/forte

Can't argue with your dislike of a dictionary. I found the capture of language to be accurate, given in practice kudo is now a word.

Motto: https://www.goodreads.com/quotes/550389-when-i-use-a-word-it-means-just-what-i

entry.title: [P00] NFS Service について
entry.content:
先日、本番稼働中のシステムにおいて、NFSマウントしているディレクトリが消失したたため、
ジョブが実行できないという障害が発生しました。
原因については、HEC様のオペレーションミスとの報告がありました。
現時点では障害は復旧しておりますが、今後の対応として、NFSサービスの稼働監視とディレクトリ監視を実施していきたいと
検討しております。

システムは、APサーバが2台構成となっております。
SAP ABAPシステム用の標準SAP ディレクトリ構成として、/sapmnt, /usr/sap/trans のディレクトリに関しては、
AP1号機側からのNFSマウントにて、共有されているとの理解です。
この場合、AP1号機は、NFSサーバとなり、AP2号機は、NFSクライアントとなる理解です。
NFSを利用する場合において、NFSサーバ側(AP1号機)、NFSクライン後側(AP2号機)、それぞれで、稼働が必要なサービスについて
ご教授お願いします。NFSサーバ側(AP1号機)とNFSクライン後側(AP2号機)では、必要なサービスはそれぞれ異なるという理解です。
稼働が必要なサービスを特定し、そのサービスに異常が発生した時に監視できることを考えております。

NFSについては、バージョン3 が利用されているとの理解しております。
バージョン４とバージョン３にて、利用されるサービスが異なる場合については、それぞれで必要となるサービスについて教えて下さい。
NFSサービスを利用するにあたり、必要なサービスについて説明等されている文章やナレッジがありましたら、案内いただけますと助かります。


宜しくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [P00] NFS Service について
entry.content:
NFSサーバ（AP1号機）とNFSクライアント（AP2号機）で必要なサービスは異なります。以下に、それぞれの役割と必要なサービスについて説明します。

NFSサーバ（AP1号機）で必要なサービス:

  1. nfs-server: NFSサーバを提供するサービスです。これにより、指定されたディレクトリをネットワーク上で共有できます。
  2. rpcbind: NFSv3では、RPC（Remote Procedure Call）を使用して通信を行います。rpcbindは、RPCサービスのアドレスとプログラム番号をマッピングする役割を持ちます。
  3. rpc.statd: NFSのロック管理（ファイルロックなど）を行うためのサービスです。
  4. rpc.mountd: クライアントからのマウントリクエストを処理するサービスです。

NFSクライアント（AP2号機）で必要なサービス:

  1. nfs-client: NFSクライアント機能を提供するサービスです。これにより、サーバ上の共有ディレクトリをマウントできます。
  2. rpc.statd: NFSクライアント側でも、ファイルロックに関するサービスが必要です。

NFSv4での追加の考慮点:

NFSv4では、rpcbind、rpc.statd、rpc.mountdなどの追加のデーモンが不要になる場合があります。NFSv4は、単一のポート（通常は2049）を使用し、セキュリティ強化（Kerberos認証など）が組み込まれています。

監視について:

NFSサービスの監視には、以下のような方法が考えられます。

  1. プロセス監視: 上記で挙げたサービスのプロセスが稼働しているかを確認します。
  2. ポート監視: NFSが使用するポート（NFSv3の場合は111（rpcbind）、2049（nfsd）など）が開いているかを確認します。
  3. マウント監視: クライアント側で、マウントされたディレクトリが正常にアクセス可能かを確認します。
  4. ログ監視: NFS関連のログを監視し、エラーや異常を検出します。

監視ツールとしては、Nagios、Zabbix、Prometheusなどが一般的に使用されます。これらのツールを使用して、上記の監視項目を自動化し、異常が発生した際にアラートを発するように設定することができます。

entry.title: Sap Customer checkout Installation not recognized from CCOM
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

Hope all are keeping well as usual ...!

Recently we have started creating a test environment for one of our customer users after implementing Branch in SAP Business One (10 2111) So to give fresh Sap Customer Checkout manager and monitor we had deleted existing data bases and recreate them accordingly . Now SAP customer checkout manager working fine for the test data base . So with in the same server we have installed CCO (HPOS is the name) V2.0 FP17 PL05 and it had recognized in the Customer checkout manager and allowed us to assign license . But when we installed another CCO with in one of branches (PAN1 is the name) this instance is not showing in Sap Customer checkout manager to assign licenses even though connection get successful . When going to fetch a public key from the integration tab an error message comes saying  "Customer Checkout Manager Not reachable" but connection successful . Even several restart been done but still not showing .

So could anyone please advise on this to get rid of this at our earliest because customer is waiting to go live soon when testing over .

Thanks in advance .  

SAP Customer Checkout SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge: Demystifying the Remote Conversion
entry.content:
Hi Prem,

Yes, you can create InfoObjects, ADSOs, and CompositeProviders in BW bridge. See SAP Help for more details, for example: Creating DataStore Objects 

Note the restrictions in BW bridge, see SAP Note 3117800.

Regards,
Dominik

entry.title: Re: SAP Manufacturing Execution training
entry.content:
Hi Sergiuy

Could you tell me what parameters the NC-CODE was configured?

Here is mine:

Status : Enabled ; Assign NC to Component : Stay; Nc catégoy : Défault; DPMO Category : None; NC Data Type : None; Collect Required NC Data on NC : Close; Message type : Empty; NC priority : 500; Maximum NC Limit (SFC) : 0; Severity of nonconformance: medium; Can Be Primary code : checked; Close Required : checked. Everything else is configured to  unchecked.

Thanking you in advance

Regards

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
@peterczo You can make SAP S/4HANA events available to 3rd party brokers using different channels. A direct exposure of SAP standard events is not possible. You would have to take one step in between, as you had already assumed.

So, either Advanced Event Mesh or SAP Integration Suite would be needed and should support your required connectivity out of the box. SAP Event Mesh you could probably make work as well, I would not recommend it due to the smaller throughput and the fact that you would have to take care of the connectivity to your broker technology.

So, either Integration Suite or AEM would be your recommended path.

Best,

Karsten

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Proudly Nigerian

entry.title: Understand CSRF handling in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
What is CSRF?

CSRF stands for Cross-Site Request Forgery. It is a type of malicious attack that tricks the victim into submitting a malicious request. It uses the identity and privileges of the victim to perform an undesired function on their behalf. For instance, this could involve changing an email address or password, or making a purchase. The attack can cause damage even if the exploited action is normally harmless because it's performed without the user's consent or knowledge.

What is the defense mechanism?

CSRF token is a security measure used in web applications to protect against CSRF attacks.

It is a unique, random value associated with a user's session and is typically embedded within a form or URL to ensure that the user is intentionally submitting the request. This token is checked by the server to verify the source of the request, preventing malicious parties from tricking a user's browser into making a request on their behalf.

This is usually taken care of by the browser from where the app is launched and accesses APIs.

CSRF tokens are mainly used for communication with the server. Before an app is allowed to execute a modify operation through an HTTP request such as POST, PUT, DELETE etc., a CSRF token is generated by the server to ensure the security of the operation.

Here is a brief process of how it is used:

  1. First, the app sends a GET request to fetch a CSRF token from the server.
  2. During the GET request, the server generates a new CSRF token and sends it back in the response headers (usually under "x-csrf-token").
  3. The app then uses this token in the header of every modification request.
  4. The server validates the CSRF token in every modifying request. If it's valid, the operation proceeds.
  5. If it's not valid or missing, the server returns a 403 (Forbidden) status, and the operation does not proceed.

In this way, the CSRF token ensures that every operation modifying data is secure, authenticated, and originated from a trusted source. It protects against CSRF attacks where an attacker might trick a victim into executing actions of the attacker's choosing.

Why do we need additional CSRF handling for SAP Build Apps?

To ensure application security, it is essential to understand and manage CSRF token use effectively, as it is crucial in preventing unwanted actions from being performed.

In SAP Build Apps because of the current architecture, extra CSRF token handling is required sometimes for end-user deployed apps with a back-end connection accessing an API indirectly (via a destination such as S/4 HANA) wherein the request to the API goes through via managed app-router.

To be more precise, all installed destinations are CSRF protected by managed app-router, by default. However, if a backend behind a destination has its own CSRF protection, you need to tell SAP Build Apps to switch off managed app-router’s CSRF protection for that specific destination.

This is because when your app is fetching the CSRF token, it will end up getting the CSRF token from managed app-router and then it will send it to backend and fail because the backend doesn’t recognize that token.

What is the consequence of not handling the CSRF in SAP Build Apps?

In this case the symptom would be that the deployed build apps fail with a 403 (forbidden) error as illustrated in one example below.

Disclaimer: As of today it is not possible to show this failure early in the Preview mode as the request handling here (and in the design time) is done via destination-proxy. So in general, no additional CSRF handling is required for design-time and preview mode.

How to overcome this issue?

To overcome this issue, we need to extend your destination (only for some backends which has it's own CSRF protection (such as S/4 Hana backends)) with the tag below to tell the Build Apps to switch off the managed app-router’s CSRF protection for that specific destination.

 

BuildApps.RequiresCsrf = true

 

This way, when your app is fetching the CSRF token, managed app-router won’t interfere and you will get the CSRF token from backend and then when you send it to backend it will work (because the backend will recognize that token).

NOTE: If the SAP Build apps is already built and deployed then we need to also rebuild and redeploy the application for this change in the destination to take effect.

Additional Reading

Refer to the SAP Systems | SAP Help Portal under the 'Adding Data Endpoints' section.

entry.title: Re: Good to Know: SAP Travel Management for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Hi, are these S/4HANA Travel Apps 2022 working without using the Business User represented by a Business Partner? And if not, why not? How do i know, that a Fiori Apps needs the Business User model to run?

entry.title: Re: July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content: Interesting that none of the July answers I saw posted had code in text boxes; all I can see are screenshots. We should encourage the former, for readability where feasible.

entry.title: Re: S4 Public Cloud - Standard order types - Rush Order type ( RO ) and Cash Sales ( CS ).
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. ​ You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Procedure cached plans not reused for new connection
entry.content:
Hi Mark,

we used to be an longtime OEM Partner with Sybase, then SAP of course but sadly, it was not possible to maintain that OEM Partner-status due to new restrictions of SAP.

We have however found a workaround for our 'global temporary table'-recompile issue. It is not perfect, but we do not notice any performance loss using our work-around.

Workaround:

  • create a real table in stead of a global temporary table (we use a separate DB for this), but add a spid column that has a default value @@spid
  • create a function _get_spid that select the current spid (select @@spid)
  • create a view that selects every column from this new table but adds 'where spid = dbo._get_spid' (we can't use @@spid in a function, so we cheated a bit and use a function for that)
  • Now we can use this table as it was a global temporary table, meaning we can add data into the table without defining our own @@spid every time (we are developers, we are lazy)

When using this real table, the stored procedure does not recompile any more on every new connection! We realize that there is function call extra needed, but the data added to this tables is never that much, so performance wise we don't see any issues.

Greetz
Pieter

entry.title: Re: i have a p user, how can i access SAP S4 Hana for practice

entry.title: SuccessFactors IPS Read Job not Running
entry.content:
Hi,

Since the 23/07/2024 our SuccessFactors Source System Read job has not been triggered and does not show up in the provisioning logs. We have tried manually running the Read and Resync jobs and we get a pop up saying the job has been triggered but when we then check the provisioning logs, nothing is showing and our new users are not being created. The Job last ran on - 22/Jul/2024 and all other jobs are running as expected just not SuccessFactors IPS read jobs. 

Have any other customer come across this same issue before?

Thanks

Stephen

entry.title: Re: New Line Character String Length Issue In Groovy
entry.content:
as a workaround you could remove linebreaks:

    def textWithoutLineBreaks = body.replaceAll("\\n|\\r", "")

 But someone with deeper knowledge should answer this strange behaviour

entry.title: Re: SAP Manufacturing Execution training
entry.content: Status: Enabled. Assign NC to Component: Stay. NC Category: Failure. DPMO Category: None. NC Data Type: SIMPLE. Collect Required NC Data on NC: Open. Can Be Primary Code: selected. Closure Required: unselected.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Service Layer: error code - 206 (Bad Patch content)
entry.content: We have exactly the same issue, I'm not sure we are missing a small detail... Is your solution working now?

entry.title: Re: Alt Condition base value
entry.content:
Hello, 

In principle, an Alt Condition base value will work as mentioned by you and it can be given a try. 

Have you explored all the Functional ways (with standard pricing settings) to achieve this requirement? 

Thanks,

entry.title: Attaching documents to work orders via Equipment Masters
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a requirement to attach documents (.doc) to a planned maintenance work order generated by a Maintenance Plan.

We have equipment that requires an annual service as well as a six monthly service. The .doc files will differ between the two planned services. There are other checks that fall under planned maintenance so there could be around four different files per equipment.

Efforts to achieve this previously have resulted in all associated .doc files being attached rather than specific ones, so can SAP distinguish which file it needs depending on which type of service is being done, and only attach that file to the generated work order?

As well as service/planned maintenance orders (PM01) we may also have breakdown orders generated (PM02) and naturally I would like to exclude PM02 when attaching files.

Any help, pointers or advice would be most welcome.

Thank you so much

//Lee

entry.title: Re: Contingent worker Multiple employment scenario

Hi Smitha,

Thanks

Haji

entry.title: Re: How to connect Coupa from SAP BTP Integration Suite
entry.content: As of 2024 you can simply use SAP's Coupa adapter from SAP Integration Suite; https://api.sap.com/package/CoupaAdapterforSAPIntegrationSuite/overview

entry.title: Re: Connect datasphere to SAP analytics cloud for planning
entry.content:
Hello @Deb_D 

There is no source-system SAP Datasphere for Import in the SAC.

You can only create a Live-Connection to the Datasphere.

There is another Blog, which maybe helps with repointing a SAC story to another Datasphere AM:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/repointing-system-sac-stories-with-datasphere-models-as-data-source/ba-p/13558845 

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Error when I upgrade HANA database from ver: 2402 to...
entry.content: Reminder 1

entry.title: Re: API/BOI for VL10B
entry.content:
Hello Victor,

indeed, there's currently no RAP-based API available for this operation, but you could look into this OData API to check if it works in your specific context: Outbound Delivery (A2X) (Link to API Hub: https://api.sap.com/api/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV_0002/overview ). Its documentation states the following for the operation "Create Outbound Delivery": "To create an outbound delivery with reference to a sales order, a stock transport order, a sales scheduling agreement or a returns purchase order, use the http method POST on the A_OutbDeliveryHeader entity." (Link to Help Portal: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/588780cab2774a7ab9fffca3a7f919fe/ab6845012ee148ba9c2694648c2a0685.html ).

Best regards,

Marc

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Opportunity Marketplace & SAP Business AI-powered Recommendation
entry.content:
Thank you for the information!

Could you please provide more details on how the rule-based option can be utilized for assignment recommendations?

Specifically, I'm trying to ensure that an assignment under the "Broaden Your Experience" section is suggested to employees with a specific role.

Any guidance or steps on how to set up rule-based recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Every time PRD key triggered instead of BSX during MIGO 101 movement
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I experienced that when I tried to do the MIGO (101 Movement) that time system fetched the PRD key only instead of BSX key. The system is generated below Journal entry only every time: - 

Price Difference Account - - - - - - - Debit                      PRD

To GR/IR Clearing Account - - - - - - Credit                    WRX

The entry SHOULD be: - 

Raw Material Inventory Account - - - - -Debit                BRX

To GR/IR Clearing Account - - - - - - - - -Credit               WRX

So, could you please guide me where I missed something with respect to configuration?

Thanks in advance for your prompt assistance.

Regards,

Varun

entry.title: Re: Multiple BP Bank account - SEPA Direct Debit.
entry.content: Morning Brahms86.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build app transaction data not being saved to Vis...
entry.content: @Dan_Wroblewski , I found the mistake. Mistake was even after binding the screen field value variable to page variable i additionally configured events(component on change) to set the variable which was reason for making the variable value to blank. Now i removed event variable set functions & its working perfectly fine. Thank you very much for your guidance.

entry.title: Re: TCODE For Retail Easy Access
entry.content:
The transaction W10T has been removed from SAP S/4 HANA Retail for merchandise management.

W10M Can be used.

entry.title: Re: Data purge from SF Mobile app
entry.content:
Hi @SandraCalzada - Apologies I have been on leave.

The influence request is as follows :

Manage Mobile Users Data Extract Enhancements

Request ID: 289549, Category: Reporting & Analytics
 
I hope this helps!
 
Thanks
Sam

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 UI error after upgrade
entry.content:
Hello 

We had the same issue when we upgraded, we also have B1UP. 

I believe the issue relates to when the UI has been changed in the UI configuration via SAP and B1UP at the same time. 

To fix it I removed users from the default configuration template and created a new group with all default layouts with configuration done via B1UP instead. It wasn't easy and if anyone has a better solution I'm all ears.

entry.title: Re: Create button is Greyed-out in Manage incidents > Peo...
entry.content:
Hi @phaneendra_k,

this is the exact behavior, which is caused by missing authorizations. You can check the following information in the help portal:

SAP Business Partner - Authorization Management

You need to request additional authorizations to be able to create BP master data. The necessary objects are described in details in the link above. SAP also delivers standard template roles for this, which your team should be aware of. If you need additional information, you can also check the multiple topics in the SAP Community about Business Partner authorizations.

Best regards, 
Georgi

entry.title: Re: Enhancing Costs, Usage and Contract Transparency
entry.content: Hi! Thanks for the information on the release. Am wondering if there is anything that can be setup on a global account for alerting when new services are spun up on a subaccount or if a quota is met based on a limit we can set within our own account? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CONFIRM_DEC replacement in S/4HANA...
entry.content:
Hello,

as already noticed correctly, the Outbound Delivery OData API does support PGI operation. The respective RAP BO will support it in future. Apart from that I am not aware of any other option. Please use the Continuous Influence Portal Session (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Supply Chain Logistics => Category: Delivery Management) to raise a feature request. This way, we could also learn how many other customers would be interested in having this and prfioritize it accordingly.

Best regards,

Darius Nowak, SAP SE

S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Product Management

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
(I do enjoy these word discussions). Forte is (for me) both expertise and a musical direction, with the same root (strong (-> strength), loud) - I don't see a distinction. I always think of the French accented pronunciation which has the final t (and silent last e) as just enough sound to be a second syllable.

And no, despite what you might claim, kudo is not a word. At least not in my household 🙂

entry.title: Spotkanie Katowickiej Grupy SAP Community - Czerwiec/Lipiec
entry.content:
Duży impuls do dalszego działania dają przede wszystkim też nowe osoby, któe dołączają do spotkania i dzielą się swoimi doświadczeniami. Możemy tylko zachęcić do dalszego obserwowania i odwiedzania tych spotkań.  

 

Tak jak ustaliliśmy wcześniej, następne spotkanie już 21.08. 2024r., krótko przed nowym rokiem szkolnym ;-).  Zapisy pomogą w rezerwacji odpowiedniej wielkości stolika, więc daj znać, że będziesz:

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-stammtisch/katowice-sap-stammtisch-21-08-2024/ev-p/13746521 

Planujemy również razem się spotkać w okolicy Trzech Stawów. Link do lokalizacji poniżej:
https://g.co/kgs/i9UXSCT  

 

Życzymy wszystkiego dobrego i zapraszamy do zapisywania się na sierpniowe spotkanie w znakomitym gronie :-)!

entry.title: Re: Supply Planning on Fashion Contracts with SAP S/4HANA Fashion & Vertical Business
entry.content: Can we create a fashion contract for raw material and then run the MRP, and later we create a sale order for finished material (containing BOM with that raw material) and then run the MRP of that sale order or finished material? Will the system consider the fashion contract for raw material?

entry.title: Customization synchronization from two source systems to SAP MDG through SOLMAN
entry.content:
Hello All,
 
How can we sync the customization from two source systems to SAP MDG? Let's take a scenario.

We do have two source systems ECC_NA and ECC_EU. ECC_NA has three payment terms and ECC_EU also.
 

Source System1

Fields

Values

ECC_NA

Payment Terms

A01

 

 

A02

 

 

A03

 

Source System2

Fields

Values

ECC_EU

Payment Terms

A008

 

 

A009

 

 

A001

 

 

  1. If we do the customization sync with ECC_NA then three payment terms will be available in MDG. If we do the customization sync again with ECC_EU then all existing payment terms will get deleted and ECC_EU system payment terms will be available.
  2. How can we identify which payment term belongs to which system?

Thanks

Rahul Khandelwal

 

@0012anirban

 @Mark63

entry.title: Re: Device type SAPWIN + formats are deleted
entry.content: Do you mean these formats in the below screenshot? Why are they deleted, or how do you know they were deleted? Did you try to export SAPWIN from another system and import?
